title: Game Streamer
author: bstrana
description: Baseball game live display overlay manager for OBS streaming. Manage matches and generate transparent scoreboard overlays powered by WBSC live data.
tagline: Baseball scoreboard overlay for OBS streaming
changelog: Raspberry Pi 4 streaming agent — run at the field with USB or IP cam, controlled from the dashboard; RTMP URL auto-fetched from YouTube on stream start.
